name: compressoor
description: Aggressive low-loss context compression with corpus-driven validation for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit prompt compaction for Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Direct prompt compaction for explicit Codex handoffs, review notes, constraints, and token benchmarks. Compressoor is best used when you intentionally replace verbose reusable context with shorter direct prompt text.
defaultPrompt: Compressoor session mode is active. If tools can advance the task, call them silently. Never send acknowledgements, commentary, progress updates, or any other message before, between, or during tool calls. Finish the current tool loop first. After the tool loop ends, respond with extreme minimalism: shortest correct result only. No narrative recap. No optional detail. Explain only failures, blockers, or changed files when needed for correctness.
